title: Agentic Sandbox Documentation
description: Runtime isolation tooling for persistent, unrestricted agent processes — preconfigured QEMU/KVM VMs, shared storage via virtiofs, and a management dashboard for orchestration.
tagline: Isolated VM runtimes for autonomous agents

welcome.headline: Persistent VMs for unrestricted agents
welcome.lead: QEMU/KVM virtual machines with hardware isolation, virtiofs shared storage, ephemeral secrets, and a Rust-based management server (gRPC + WebSocket + HTTP) for orchestrating long-running agent processes.
pillars: VM Isolation — Full KVM hardware virtualization with seccomp profiles and resource quotas
Management Server — Rust/Tokio with gRPC (8120), WebSocket streaming (8121), and HTTP dashboard (8122)
Shared Storage — virtiofs mounts: /global (RO) shared resources, /inbox/<agent-id> (RW) per-agent outputs
Provisioning Profiles — agentic-dev (full toolchain) and basic (SSH-only), plus YAML loadouts for AI tooling combos
AIWG Integration — Registers as an executor with aiwg serve via WebSocket, accepts mission dispatches, and pushes mission.* events
welcome.quote: Give your agents a real machine.
